breaches.label: AMYY
breaches.source: 5,763 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 16,500 60d med = 4,950 sh cap) (116% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 520,001 out = 182,000 sh cap) (3% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~1,803 sh on AMYY to reach warn band (813 sh over median vol (30% × 16,500 60d med = 4,950 sh cap)).

breaches.label: BBYY
breaches.source: 4,500 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 1,350 60d med = 405 sh cap) (1111% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 80,001 out = 28,000 sh cap) (16% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~4,176 sh on BBYY to reach warn band (4,095 sh over median vol (30% × 1,350 60d med = 405 sh cap)).

breaches.label: CWY
breaches.source: 1,299 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 1,900 60d med = 570 sh cap) (228% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 30,001 out = 10,500 sh cap) (12% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~843 sh on CWY to reach warn band (729 sh over median vol (30% × 1,900 60d med = 570 sh cap)).

breaches.label: FBYY
breaches.source: 4,180 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 800 60d med = 240 sh cap) (1742% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 30,001 out = 10,500 sh cap) (40% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~3,988 sh on FBYY to reach warn band (3,940 sh over median vol (30% × 800 60d med = 240 sh cap)).

breaches.label: HMYY
breaches.source: 3,486 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 2,700 60d med = 810 sh cap) (430% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 110,001 out = 38,500 sh cap) (9% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~2,838 sh on HMYY to reach warn band (2,676 sh over median vol (30% × 2,700 60d med = 810 sh cap)).

breaches.label: HOYY
breaches.source: 8,367 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 33,450 60d med = 10,035 sh cap) (83% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 1,520,001 out = 532,000 sh cap) (2% of cap)
breaches.action: Trim ~339 sh on HOYY toward warn band (8,367 sh short vs 10,035 sh median vol (30% × 33,450 60d med = 10,035 sh cap)).

breaches.label: IOYY
breaches.source: 15,134 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 17,800 60d med = 5,340 sh cap) (283% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 670,001 out = 234,500 sh cap) (6% of cap)

breaches.action: Cut ~7,479 sh on MAAY to reach warn band (6,975 sh over median vol (30% × 8,400 60d med = 2,520 sh cap)).

breaches.label: MTYY
breaches.source: 35,943 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 16,750 60d med = 5,025 sh cap) (715% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 650,001 out = 227,500 sh cap) (16% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~31,923 sh on MTYY to reach warn band (30,918 sh over median vol (30% × 16,750 60d med = 5,025 sh cap)).

breaches.label: QBY
breaches.source: 6,899 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 4,800 60d med = 1,440 sh cap) (479% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 240,001 out = 84,000 sh cap) (8% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~5,747 sh on QBY to reach warn band (5,459 sh over median vol (30% × 4,800 60d med = 1,440 sh cap)).

breaches.label: RTYY

breaches.label: SMYY

indices.description: T+0: instantaneous portfolio β×ΔSPX. 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows integrate piecewise SPX paths.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected net book carry over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, optional spike-revert path integral, and VIX-stressed borrow on short legs.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Buckets 1, 2, and 4

display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Delta-normalized flow hedge overlay (|β| × notional), not share gross.

capital_panel.return_denominator_note: ROC / ROG / ROM denominators = average per-day capital since 2026-02-27 (same as EOD email). ROC omitted when avg net capital is not positive.
